case_title: SHAWN BEYER VS. MERCEDES-BENZ USA, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-19-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF SHAWN BEYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERCEDES-BENZ USA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MELISSA DAWSON, OPERATIONS MANAGER. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE MEDIATION PROGRAM AND HAVE SUCCESSFULLY REACHED A SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE SEPTEMBER HEARING, CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
